claims.name: Gemma refitted-utility shifted-prediction r
claims.statement: Mean across Exp 1b conditions of the Pearson r between the default-persona Gemma-3-27B ridge probe (L31) applied under each system prompt and the Thurstonian utilities refit from pairwise choices under that same prompt. Matches §4.1 prose (r = 0.63) and utility_fitting_report line 40.
claims.derivation: Load analysis_results.json (list of per-condition rows); filter experiment=='exp1b_hidden'; take mean of `cond_probe_r`; round to 2dp. Computed mean = 0.6341, SEM = 0.0419, n_conditions = 16.
